zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Holand於1310年出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，她的父親Robert de Holand III33歲，母親Maud la Zouche23歲。她於1322年2月26日與John de Mowbray結婚。她去世於1380年5月10日在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Holand于1310年出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，她的父亲Robert de Holand III33岁，母亲Maud la Zouche23岁。她于1322年2月26日与John de Mowbray结婚。她去世于1380年5月10日在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Holand was born in 1310, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert de Holand III, was 33 and her mother, Maud la Zouche, was 23. She married John de Mowbray on 26 February 1322. She died on 10 May 1380, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Holand est née en 1310, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Holand III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Maud la Zouche, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John de Mowbray le 26 février 1322. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1380, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Holand 1310 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Holand III 33 und ihre Mutter Maud la Zouche 23. Sie hat am 26. Februar 1322 John de Mowbray geheiratet. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1380 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Holand è nata il nel 1310 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert de Holand III, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Maud la Zouche, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John de Mowbray il 26 febbraio 1322. Morì il 10 maggio 1380, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Holand(이)가 1310년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Holand III(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud la Zouche(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1322년 2월 26일 John de Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1380년 5월 10일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Holand nasceu em 1310, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Holand III, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Maud la Zouche, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Mowbray em 26 de fevereiro de 1322. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1380, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Holand родилась в 1310 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Holand III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Maud la Zouche, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Mowbray 26 февраля 1322 г. Она умерла 10 мая 1380 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Holand nació en 1310, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Holand III, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Maud la Zouche, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John de Mowbray el 26 de febrero de 1322. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1380, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
